Trusted across industries. Proven at scale.

SAM4 monitors 10,000+ assets across 5 continents. From water treatment plants to oil refineries, every industry with rotating equipment benefits from ESA.

SAM4 works wherever rotating equipment runs.

We also monitor assets in airports, pulp & paper, food & beverage, manufacturing, and more.

See all industries →

What SAM4 Delivers Across Industries

Stop Unplanned Downtime

Detect faults before they cause failures. On average, customers reduce unplanned maintenance by 40%.

Reduce Energy Waste

Optimize motor and drivetrain efficiency. Find savings of 8-15% in energy costs through predictive tuning.

Prevent Environmental Incidents

Avoid spills and leaks from catastrophic failures. Early detection protects your environment and reputation.
